📣Well, it looks to be over.📣Tonight, without any prior announcements, Twitter has disabled any access to tweets withot login. This means that the bot can't retrieve the data anymore, so I am shutting it down.I'll keep the channels, but there will be no updates unless Twitter reverses its decision or I will find a way to bypass this limitation (which is unlikely).It's very ironic and sad to see how two big platforms, Twitter and Reddit, go down the closure pass simultaneousely.Thank you for stayi

French President Macron on Iran:The impact of this war is already being felt in fuel prices at the pump, and it will also be felt in gas prices in the coming weeks.

French President Macron on Iran:I believe that nothing indicates that this war will end in the coming days.Therefore, I think this war will certainly last in this intense phase for several days, perhaps several weeks.It also depends on how each side clarifies its final objective and, ultimately, what is called the desired end state.

French President Macron on Iran:I do not believe that profound changes of regime or political systems can be achieved solely through bombardments.However, if the objective is to neutralize ballistic capabilities or a navy, that can be done within a matter of weeks.

German Chancellor Merz on Iran:The sooner the Mullah regime ends, the sooner this war will be over. It is solely up to this regime and the so-called Revolutionary Guards to cease hostilities.Until that happens, I assume that Israel and America will continue their defense against this regime.
German Chancellor Merz on Iran:Iran is the center of international terrorism, and this center must be shut down.The Americans and Israelis are doing that in their own way.

Turkish President Erdogan:Israel is trying to completely undermine the path toward a two-state solution by taking advantage of the international community’s attention shifting away from Gaza to other issues.Through the unlawful and expansionist policies it has pursued since the declaration signed on October 10, the Netanyahu government has once again shown that it does not want peace and is not in favor of a solution.
Turkish President Erdogan on Iran:In the attacks that have now entered their tenth day, nearly 1,500 Iranians have lost their lives so far, including more than 300 innocent children.
Turkish President Erdogan on Iran:We do not accept the Middle East being put back on the operating table, just as it was a century ago.

(#)#Ukraine: Six previously unseen losses of Ukrainian M2A2 Bradley ODS-SA infantry fighting vehicles, South of Mala Tokmachka,#ZaporizhzhiaOblast - at least two IFVs were destroyed and 4 were damaged and abandoned.

(#)#Ukraine: "If at first you don't succeed" When a Russian T-62MV repurposed as a crude VBIED was disabled by an AT mine yet drone-dropped munitions failed to destroy it, Ukrainians used an FPV loitering munition instead- to extremely explosive effect.
